title: Reuse the CLI session across same-stage retries to cache loaded context
description:
## Problem

`invoke_stage` (`adw/invoke.py`) captures `session_id` from the CLI envelope but
discards it. A retry of the *same* stage spawns a fresh process that re-reads the
codebase at full price, even though the CLI's prompt cache would make a resumed
session's prior reads cheap cache-reads (~10% cost).

## Approach

When re-invoking the **same** stage within a ticket (same model + same scoped
tools), pass `--resume <session_id>` from the prior attempt so the model keeps its
loaded context. Cross-*stage* reuse is out of scope: stages change model
(opus<->sonnet) and tool scope, so their sessions are not interchangeable.
acceptance_criteria: A same-stage retry resumes the prior attempt's session via `--resume` when model
A fresh stage, a different model, or a first attempt still starts cold.
Full suite stays green (`uv run pytest -q`).
